title: Author a flash component with :if gating
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/flash.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Flash). flash/1 attrs: :flash (map, required), :kind (string, required values ["info", "error", "success"]). Render
{message}
. Use the `:if={x = ...}` binding pattern to avoid rendering when no message is present.
tier_rationale: Uses the `:if={x = }` binding pattern which is a lesser-known HEEx idiom.
